name: usertour-lens
description: Pick any element on a page and instantly get its CSS selector. Built for Usertour creators who want to visually select elements without writing selectors manually.

scripts.package: rm -rf dist && mkdir dist && zip -r dist/usertour-lens.zip . -x 'node_modules/*' 'tests/*' '.git/*' '.github/*' '*.md' '.gitignore' 'eslint.config.mjs' '.prettierrc' 'package.json' 'package-lock.json' 'vitest.config.mjs'
